case_title: ST. GEORGE PATHFINDERS, INC. VS. ALL COSSACK'S UNION OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUN-19-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL EX PARTE MOTION /APPLICATION FOR CONTINUANCE AND DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT ST. GEORGE PATHFINDERS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ST. GEORGE PATHFINDERS, INC. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ALL COSSACK'S UNION OF SAN FRANCISCO $3,960.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,025.00, JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED AS MODIFIED. HISTORICALLY, THE PAYMENT WAS GENERALLY CALCULATED AS 25% OF PG&E, WATER, GARBAGE, CLEANING AND ELEVATOR AND 20% OF INSURANCE. USING 2018 FIGURES (EXHIBIT B) $3,603.90, $1,274.43, $1,920.78 AND $11,705.90 / 12 = $18,505.01 X 25% = $385.52 AND INSURANCE OF $6,578.00 / 12 = $548.17 X 20% = $109.64. THE TOTAL OF THESE SUMS IS $495.15 WHICH IS MORE THAN THE CURRENT AGREED AMOUNT OF $330.00/MONTH. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF APR-19-2019 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - DEFENDANT'S PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE ON FILE. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ST. GEORGE PATHFINDERS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALL COSSACK'S UNION OF SAN FRANCISCO $3,540.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,605.00, THE COURT TOOK INTO ACCOUNT CHANGED CIRCUMSTANCES AND THE RELATIVE SHARES OF THE APPROXIMATE $28,566 IN ANNUAL OPERATING COSTS. 48.2 % SGP / 39.4 % (OTHER TENANT) /ACU = 12.4%.THE PARTIES SHALL DISCUSS WHETHER $3540 OR $295 PER MONTH REPRESENTS A FAIRER ALLOCATION OF ACU'S CURRENT SHARE OF THE COST AND WHETHER A NEW CONTRAST WOULD BE APPROPRIATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
